svg.title: Synalux POS — Ureak tracking
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for Ureak tracking. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Discrete paid/unpaid break clock events per shift. CA/NY labor law compliance. Missed break alerts.
California: 30-min unpaid meal break for shifts > 5 hrs; 10-min paid rest per 4 hrs worked. Missed break = premium pay
penalty ($1/hr extra). New York: similar requirements. Configure break rules below to avoid labor law violations.
Alert manager if employee hasn't taken meal break
After 5 hrs 15 min on shift without break · Push notification + register badge
Auto-clock break start (staff must manually start)
Require manager approval to skip break
Premium pay — log premium pay if break missed
You've been on shift for 5+ hours. Please take your 30-min meal break.
Feeds Gusto payroll · earnings code BRKPREM
Visual representation of break events embedded in full shift record
NEW: pos_shift_breaks { shift_id, break_type varchar, started_at timestamptz, ended_at timestamptz, paid boolean, missed boolean, premium_pay_cents integer }
Alert cron (every 15 min): check active shifts → if shift_duration − total_break_min > threshold → push alert to manager device + register badge.
Premium pay calc: hours_worked_after_required_break_due x premium_rate → INSERT pos_premium_pay_log. Gusto export: earnings code "BRKPREM".
iPad break flow: staff taps "Start Break" → INSERT pos_shift_breaks (started_at=NOW) → register locked → "End Break" → UPDATE row.
pos_premium_pay_log linked to Gusto via payroll_integration_id. CA requires 1-hour premium (not $1); NY: $1/hr extra. Rule engine reads state from pos_config.tax_zone.
